properties.verseOrder: V1 V2 V3 V4 C5 V6 C5 V7

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: Jesus at the center of it all Jesus at the center of it all From beginning to the end It will always be, it's always been You Jesus, Jesus

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: Nothing else matters Nothing in this world will do 'Cause Jesus You're the center Everything revolves around You Jesus You At the center of it all At the center of it all

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: Jesus be the center of my life Jesus be the center of my life From beginning to the end It will always be, it's always been You Jesus, Jesus

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: Nothing else matters Nothing in this world will do 'Cause Jesus You're the center Everything revolves around You Jesus You

verse.name: C5
verse.lines: From my heart to the Heavens Jesus be the center It's all about You Yes it's all about You

verse.name: V6
verse.lines: Jesus be the center of Your church Jesus be the center of Your church And every knee will bow And every tongue shall confess You Jesus, Jesus Jesus, Jesus Jesus, Jesus Jesus, Jesus

verse.name: V7
verse.lines: It's all about You, all about You, Jesus
